bridge_claim: At T≈γₙ, σ=½ spiral is tighter (tightness -1.7119) than σ≠½ (tightness -1.7442), contrast = 0.0323. Gonek-Montgomery spiral geometry provides geometric evidence for σ-selectivity, independent of Dirichlet energy minimum analysis.
gap_statement: EMPIRICAL ONLY: Finite P_max=150 model. The σ-selectivity of the spiral is NOT yet proved for P→∞. Proving tightening iff T≈γₙ requires the X→∞ analytic limit (Bridge 9 lemma).
